messages.author: Papa_Joyeux
messages.text: Hi ! I'm new on this wonderful world of LoRa MeshCore I have some ESP32C3 Mini at home. I want to add a SX1262 for make my first client node. Did someone has already do this ? Have you some tutorial for wiring / programming this ? A HT-RA62 is a good chip for ? Thanks for your answer and sorry for my bad English.
messages.content_html: Hi ! I'm new on this wonderful world of LoRa MeshCore I have some ESP32C3 Mini at home. I want to add a SX1262 for make my first client node. Did someone has already do this ? Have you some tutorial for wiring / programming this ? A HT-RA62 is a good chip for ? Thanks for your answer and sorry for my bad English.
